---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
title: "[Feature] "
labels: [enhancement]
assignees: []
---

## Problem Statement

What workflow or limitation are you trying to improve?

## Proposed Change

Describe the feature you want.

## Expected User Flow

Explain how someone would use it in practice.

## Alternatives Considered

List any alternatives, workarounds, or related tools.

## Additional Context

Include debugger architecture, MCP host, or compatibility constraints if relevant.
